mapper.insert:
insert into user_attention
userAttentionId,
observerId,
attentedId,
attentionStatus,
reportType,
attentionDate,
#{userAttentionId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{observerId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{attentedId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{attentionStatus,jdbcType=TINYINT},
#{reportType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{attentionDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.select: select dy.dynamicId, dy.publishId, ui.nickname, ui.headImgUrl, dy.content, dy.publishImgUrl, dy.socialGroupId, case when dy.socialGroupId is null then 0 when dy.socialGroupId=0 then 0 else 1 end as moreFlag, sg.groupName, dy.readCount, dy.dzCount, dy.plCount, (select count(1) from dz_record dr where dr.dynamicId=dy.dynamicId and dr.dzUserId=#{userId}) as dzStatus, (select case when ua.attentionStatus =1 then 1 else 0 end from user_attention ua where ua.attentedId = dy.publishId and ua.attentionStatus <> 3 and ua.observerId = #{userId}) as attentionStatus, date_format(dy.publishDate, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as publishDate from user_attention ua inner join dynamic dy on dy.publishId = ua.attentedId left join user_info ui on ui.userId = dy.publishId left join store_group sg on sg.storeGroupId = dy.socialGroupId where ua.attentionStatus = 1 and ua.observerId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT} AND dy.dynamicId NOT IN (SELECT ds.dynamicId FROM dynamic_shield ds WHERE ds.userId=#{userId}) order by dy.publishDate desc limit #{offset},#{limit}

select count(*) from user_attention ua inner join dynamic dy on dy.publishId = ua.attentedId left join user_info ui on ui.userId = dy.publishId left join store_group sg on sg.storeGroupId = dy.socialGroupId where ua.observerId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and ua.attentionStatus = 1 AND dy.dynamicId NOT IN (SELECT ds.dynamicId FROM dynamic_shield ds WHERE ds.userId=#{userId})
mapper.insert: insert into user_attention (observerId, attentedId, attentionStatus) values (#{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{attentedId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, 1)
mapper.select: select ui.userId, ui.nickname, ui.sex, ui.headImgUrl, (select u.attentionStatus from user_attention u where u.attentedId=ua.observerId and u.observerId=#{myId} and u.attentionStatus=1) as attentionStatus from user_attention ua inner join user_info ui on ui.userId = ua.observerId where ua.attentedId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and ua.attentionStatus = 1 LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
select count(*) from user_attention ua inner join user_info ui on ui.userId = ua.observerId where ua.attentedId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and ua.attentionStatus = 1

select ui.userId, ui.nickname, ui.sex, ui.headImgUrl, (select u.attentionStatus from user_attention u where u.attentedId=ua.attentedId and u.observerId=#{myId} and u.attentionStatus=1) as attentionStatus from user_attention ua inner join user_info ui on ui.userId = ua.attentedId where ua.observerId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and ua.attentionStatus = 1 LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
select count(*) from user_attention ua inner join user_info ui on ui.userId = ua.attentedId where ua.observerId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and ua.attentionStatus = 1
